title: FUSION Node Definition
description: Validates fusion-nodes/<node-name>/definition.yaml. See docs/domain.md for the full directory contract.

kind.description: Must be 'node'. Discriminates against adapter definitions.

name.description: Kebab-case node identifier. Used as the directory name under fusion-nodes/.

variables_schema.description: Maps variable names to their type descriptors. Values must declare at minimum a 'type' field.

valid_connections.description: List of node-type names this node can be adapted to. The Canvas enforces this allow-list at onConnect.

criticality.description: critical_path: failure of this node fails the whole solution. non_critical: degraded but operational.

teardown_procedure.description: Human-readable instructions for destroying what this node provisioned. Required for AU-12 teardown audit events.

maturity.description: Lifecycle stage of this node artifact.
